article_meta.title: Air Force One returns to Washington area due to minor electrical issue, White House says 1 of 4 | President Donald Trump

reasoning: The summary uses neutral, factual language and does not inherit any loaded framing. It paraphrases the AP report without adding spin or unsubstantiated claims, and attributes the caution rationale to the White House in key facts.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses neutral verbs like 'returned' and 'will continue' without interpretive wording.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: All statements match the AP article; the caution rationale is attributed.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: No subjective judgments presented as facts.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about internal motives or thoughts.
custom_reasoning.slant: Single-perspective factual update; proportionate to the source.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Includes all major details present: return, cause, timing, next steps.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Adjectives like 'minor' mirror the article’s factual description, not the model’s stance.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Tone matches the straightforward AP report.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: No preferential treatment of source types.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Paraphrases without adopting any loaded framing.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Captures the sole perspective present (White House/crew decision) proportionally.
